}} {{Quote|If we do not stop [[Riot]], he will come back here with [[Symbiotes|millions more of my kind]]."
"Millions? What, you were gonna take the [[LF2|rocket]], and you were gonna come back here with an [[Symbiote Invasion Team|invasion force]]? Then what were you gonna do, you were gonna go feed on a whole [[Earth|planet]]?"
"Yes! But it is different now, Eddie. I have decided to stay.|[[Venom]] and [[Eddie Brock]]|Venom (film)}} The '''Symbiote Invasion''' was an investigation led by reporter [[Eddie Brock]] in an attempt to reveal the truth behind the [[Life Foundation]]'s secret experiments. This led to the discovery of a planned invasion from an alien race known as [[Symbiotes]] along with Brock himself becoming bonded to a Symbiote called [[Venom]].''[[Venom (film)|Venom]]'' ==Background== ''To be added'' ==Invasion== === [[LF1 Crash]] === ''To be added'' === [[Infiltration into the Life Foundation Headquarters|Infiltrating the Life Foundation]] === ''To be added'' === [[Chase of Eddie Brock]] === ''To be added'' === [[Attack on Eddie Brock]] === ''To be added'' === [[Kidnapping of Eddie Brock]] === ''To be added'' === [[Battle at the Life Foundation Headquarters]] === {{Quote|You can take this [[Riot|guy]] right?"
"He has got shit you have never see."
"What is that mean, what is our chance?"
"Pretty much, zero."
"Oh fuck it, let's go save the [[Earth|planet]].|[[Eddie Brock]] and [[Venom]]|Venom (film)}} ''To be added'' ==Aftermath== ''To be added''''[[Venom: The Last Dance]]'' ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Earthwars}} [[Category:Wars]]
